name: Canvas2D Lane Runner
description: Reusable, config-driven endless lane runner (Subway Surfers style) with a simple pseudo-3D forward view: fixed lanes converging to a horizon, switch lanes, jump over low obstacles, duck under overhead ones, change lane for full blocks, collect coins, speed ramps, lives and game over. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: pseudo-3D forward perspective with configurable lanes (2-6)
lane switching, jump (over low obstacles), duck (under overhead obstacles)
obstacle types: jump (low), duck (overhead), block (must change lane)
coins collected in the player's lane
distance + coin score, lives, respawn invulnerability, game over, restart
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
pseudo-3D is a flat 2D projection — no real 3D, no Three.js
